name: emeltec-platform
description: Monorepo Emeltec Cloud — frontend Angular + APIs Node + pipeline Go

scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,auth,main -c cyan,yellow,magenta "pnpm --filter frontend-angular start" "pnpm --filter auth-api start" "pnpm --filter main-api dev"
scripts.sbom: pnpm list --recursive --depth=Infinity --json > sbom.json && echo SBOM escrito en sbom.json
